title: Ocimastrum minimum
taxonomy: Ocimastrum minimum is classified as a species within the Ocimum genus, which belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The Lamiaceae family is commonly known as the mint family and consists of many species of flowering plants. Ocimum is a genus of flowering plants in the mint family, native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The Ocimum genus is characterized by its fragrant leaves and small, fragrant flowers. The classification of Ocimastrum minimum is primarily based on its botanical characteristics and genetic relationships with other members of the Lamiaceae family.
